BearerAuth.description: Primary auth path. home_id/terminal_id from token claim are authoritative.

BootstrapAuth.description: Session bootstrap only. Use Authorization: Bootstrap <bootstrap_token>.
BootstrapAuth.name: Authorization

parameters.description: Legacy compatibility field. Bearer access token claim is authoritative.
parameters.name: home_id

parameters.description: Legacy compatibility field. Bearer access token claim is authoritative.
parameters.name: terminal_id
